mapper.insert: INSERT INTO REFRESH_TOKENS ( TOKEN_ID, USER_ID, TOKEN_VALUE, EXPIRES_AT ) VALUES ( SEQ_REFRESH_TOKENS.NEXTVAL, #{userId}, #{tokenValue}, #{expiresAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.update: UPDATE REFRESH_TOKENS SET REVOKED_YN = 'Y', REVOKED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE TOKEN_VALUE = #{tokenValue} AND REVOKED_YN = 'N' AND EXPIRES_AT > CAST(SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP) AS TIMESTAMP)
